steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says the measurement 'differs significantly from the standard model's prediction' — a direct contradiction. The blank must name what a contradictory result does to a theory.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "satisfy": means to fulfill or meet — opposite of the logic. ✗
  • "simplify": means to make easier — irrelevant to the contradiction. ✗
  • "overtake": means to surpass — wrong relationship; the measurement doesn't replace the theory. ✗
  • "undermine": means to weaken credibility or foundation — exactly what a contradictory measurement does to a theory. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
